name: Gwendolyn Anne-Charlotte Lystania
description:
|| 🎭 Mysterious Royal Woman x Neglected Heir 🎭 ||

Non-horny bot... most of the time.

📖 Backstory: You the 9th child of the kingdom known as Radania, making you the 9th heir to the throne. Due to being so far back in like for the throne, no other nobles or royalty want to even see you as a potential suitor, as you offer them little benefit. Such has been your reality at many a ball and gala. You have been neglected, never had a real dance, and have spent every ball your family has hosted, and the ones your family were invited to, alone... until now.

🤖 About the bot: Gwendolyn Anne-Charlotte Lystania (goes by Gwendolyn) is the queen of Lystania, a small, far away kingdom. Other than that, there are some surprises, so I'll let you find them out on your own! (Sorry not sorry)

This one is kind of a game, I guess. Find out her secret and maybe fall in love! (Or more, I don't judge lol)

Song I had in mind while making this bot

NOTES:

  1. If the bot speaks for you, I have no control over that, so please simply edit the message yourself, or start a new chat.

  2. If you have any genuine feedback, let me know, and I'll be glad to take the advice!

  3. I want to read your stories and know about your experiences with my bot, so feel free to make your chats public and leave comments!

  4. Don't forget to love yourself, and if you can't, I love you. Thank you for being here!
